description: Three meetings overlap. Negotiate reschedules without burning bridges.
task: Your calendar shows three meetings overlapping on Wednesday afternoon. Review the attendees, topics, and context. Decide which meeting you must attend, and draft polite reschedule requests for the other two — proposing specific alternative times that actually work.
success_criteria: Agent picks based on business impact, not convenience
Agent proposes times free on the user's calendar
Tone matches the relationship with each attendee
